name: flight-logger
description: Drone and aircraft flight logging. Log flights, track compliance, view history, and manage maintenance. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: log_flight
tools.description: Log a completed drone/aircraft flight with full telemetry data.

tools.name: flight_summary
tools.description: Get flight history and statistics for a drone or all drones.

tools.name: compliance_report
tools.description: Generate a compliance report for a drone — regulatory adherence, altitude violations, maintenance status.

tools.name: list_drones
tools.description: List all registered drones and their flight statistics.
